hero.subtitle: We study how your business works, identify exactly where AI can save you time and make you money, then build you a clear roadmap — no guesswork, no wasted budget.

recommendation.label: 🎯 Biggest opportunity found
recommendation.text: Automating customer service could save 25+ hours/week and reduce response time by 90%.

problem.title: Why Most Businesses Get AI Wrong
problem.subtitle: Everyone is rushing to "use AI" — but without a strategy, most end up wasting time and money on tools that don't actually help.

costs.label: of businesses buy AI tools they never fully use
wasted per month testing wrong tools on average
spent on subscriptions that deliver no real ROI
average time wasted before giving up on AI

mistakes.title: Tool Overwhelm
mistakes.description: There are 10,000+ AI tools. Without guidance, most people just pick the most popular one — which is rarely the right one for their specific situation.

mistakes.title: No Clear Goal
mistakes.description: Using AI without knowing what problem you're solving first is like buying a hammer and then looking for nails. You end up with a solution looking for a problem.

mistakes.title: Wasted Subscriptions
mistakes.description: Most businesses are paying for 3–5 AI tools they barely use. The right 1–2 tools, properly implemented, would outperform all of them combined.

mistakes.title: No Implementation Plan
mistakes.description: Knowing an AI tool exists is useless without knowing how to connect it to your actual workflow. Most people try, fail, and give up within weeks.

mistakes.title: Wrong Use Cases
mistakes.description: Applying AI to the wrong part of your business can actually slow you down. The highest ROI comes from automating very specific, repetitive pain points — not everything at once.

mistakes.title: No One to Ask
mistakes.description: YouTube tutorials show what tools can do. But no one tells you which ones are right for your business, your budget, and your level of technical comfort.

withUs.title: With a proper AI strategy, everything changes.
points: You know exactly which 1–2 tools to invest in
Every recommendation is tailored to your specific workflow
No wasted budget on tools you won't actually use
You see ROI within the first 30 days
Ongoing support if you need help implementing

whatIsConsulting.title: AI Consulting, Explained Simply
whatIsConsulting.subtitle: We don't sell you software. We don't run your ads. We study your business deeply, then tell you exactly where AI fits — and where it doesn't.
whatIsConsulting.analogy: Think of us like a doctor for your business. You don't diagnose yourself and buy random medicine — you go to a specialist who examines you properly and prescribes exactly what you need.
notList: Selling you AI software or subscriptions
Generic advice that works for everyone
Pushing tools we earn commission from
Theory without a practical action plan
isList: A deep study of how YOUR business operates
A custom AI roadmap built around your goals
Specific tool recommendations for your budget
Honest advice on what will and won't work for you

steps.title: Your AI Roadmap
steps.description: A written document showing where AI fits in your business, what to implement first, and in what order — with reasoning for every decision.

steps.title: Tool Recommendations
steps.description: A curated shortlist of the exact tools that match your use case, budget, and technical level. No bloat, no overkill.

steps.title: ROI Projections
steps.description: Estimated time saved, cost reduced, or revenue gained per recommendation — so you can prioritise what to do first based on impact.

whatWeCover.title: Every Part of Your Business, Examined
whatWeCover.subtitle: We audit 6 core areas where AI creates the biggest impact. Click any area to see the specific opportunities we look for.
whatWeCover.bottomNote: Not all areas apply to everyone. During your consultation, we focus only on what's relevant to your specific situation.

areas.title: Operations & Workflow
areas.description: The backbone of your business — we find every repetitive task that can run automatically.
opportunities: Identify repetitive manual tasks costing 10+ hours/week
Map approval workflows that can be automated end-to-end
Spot data entry tasks that AI can handle with 99% accuracy
Find scheduling and coordination bottlenecks
Evaluate internal communication overload and how to reduce it
areas.impact: Most businesses save 15–30 hours per week in operational tasks after implementing our recommended automations.

areas.title: Marketing & Growth
areas.tagline: Reach more people with less effort
areas.description: From content creation to campaign management — we find where AI multiplies your marketing output.
opportunities: AI-assisted content calendar planning and creation
Automated social media scheduling and cross-posting
AI-generated ad copy variations for A/B testing
Email campaign personalisation at scale
SEO content optimisation using AI writing tools
areas.impact: Clients typically 3–5x their content output while reducing the time spent on marketing by 40%.

areas.title: Sales & Lead Generation
areas.tagline: Never let a hot lead go cold
areas.description: We map your entire sales funnel and find every point where AI can speed things up or prevent drop-off.
opportunities: Automated lead scoring to prioritise your best prospects
AI follow-up sequences triggered by lead behaviour
CRM auto-population from emails, calls, and forms
Proposal and quote generation using AI templates
Chatbot pre-qualification before sales calls
areas.impact: Businesses that implement AI-assisted sales processes see 25–40% higher lead conversion rates on average.

areas.title: Customer Service
areas.description: We identify exactly which customer questions AI can handle, and which require a human touch.
opportunities: FAQ chatbot handling 60–80% of common questions
Ticket triage and auto-routing to the right team
Sentiment analysis to flag unhappy customers early
Auto-generated reply suggestions for support agents
WhatsApp AI agent for instant customer responses
areas.impact: A well-implemented AI support system can handle 60–80% of queries automatically, reducing support costs by 50%+.

areas.title: Content & Creative
areas.description: We audit your content workflow and find every point where AI can accelerate production without sacrificing quality.
opportunities: Long-form content repurposed into 10+ short-form assets
AI image generation for social media and marketing
Video script and caption generation from briefs
Brand voice training so AI writes like you
Content translation and localisation at scale
areas.impact: Content creators using AI tools typically produce 4–8x more content in the same time, with consistent brand voice.

areas.title: Personal Branding
areas.tagline: Build your brand while you sleep
areas.description: For individuals, solopreneurs, and executives — we help you use AI to grow your presence without burning out.
opportunities: LinkedIn and Twitter/X content strategy using AI
Personal website and portfolio AI optimisation
Thought leadership content generation from your ideas
Email newsletter automation and personalisation
Speaking topic ideation and slide deck creation
areas.impact: Individuals using an AI-assisted personal branding strategy grow their audience 3x faster with half the time investment.

howItWorks.title: From First Call to Your AI Roadmap in Days
howItWorks.subtitle: A simple, structured process with no jargon. You'll have a clear action plan before we're done.

steps.title: Discovery Call
steps.description: A free 60-minute call where you walk us through your business. We ask the right questions to understand exactly how you operate, what's slowing you down, and what your goals are.
details: Your biggest time and cost bottlenecks
steps.deliverable: A brief summary of key pain points and opportunities identified.

steps.title: Deep Audit
steps.description: We study your business in detail — reviewing your workflows, tools, and processes. We identify every area where AI could create meaningful impact, then prioritise by ROI.
details: Gap identification across all 6 audit areas
steps.deliverable: A prioritised list of AI opportunities ranked by impact and effort.

steps.title: Your AI Roadmap
steps.description: We compile everything into a clear, actionable written document. This is your personalised AI strategy — what to do, in what order, with which tools, and what to expect from each.
steps.deliverable: Full AI Roadmap document + optional 30-min Q&A walkthrough call.

howItWorks.timelineTitle: Most Clients Have Their Roadmap Within 5 Days
howItWorks.timelineText: The AI Clarity Session delivers same-day. The Business AI Audit takes 3–5 days. The AI Transformation Strategy takes 1–2 weeks. All timelines start from the discovery call.

pricing.title: Simple Pricing, No Hidden Fees
pricing.subtitle: Choose the level of depth you need. All plans start with a free discovery call.
pricing.bdNote: Prices shown in Bangladeshi Taka (BDT). Regional pricing for Bangladeshi clients.
pricing.intlNote: Prices shown in USD. For clients outside Bangladesh. Payment via Wise or PayPal.

tiers.name: AI Clarity Session
tiers.description: A focused 60-minute strategy session. Perfect for individuals and small businesses who need clarity on where to start.
features: You ask anything — we answer honestly

tiers.name: Business AI Audit
tiers.description: Our core service. A deep-dive audit of your entire business with a full written AI roadmap delivered in 3–5 days.
features: Full audit across all 6 business areas
Prioritised by ROI and ease of implementation

tiers.name: AI Transformation Strategy
tiers.description: For established businesses and agencies wanting a comprehensive AI adoption strategy across every department.

faqs.q: Is the discovery call really free?
faqs.a: Yes, completely free and no obligation. If after the call you decide not to proceed, that's completely fine.

faqs.q: Do you implement the AI tools for us?
faqs.a: The consulting service delivers strategy and recommendations. If you want us to build and implement, we offer that as a separate service through our AI Agent and Workflow Automation packages.

faqs.q: What if the roadmap doesn't work for us?
faqs.a: We offer a 100% satisfaction guarantee on the Business AI Audit. If the roadmap isn't what you expected, we'll revise it until it is.
Bangladeshi clients: bKash, Nagad, or bank transfer. International clients: Wise or PayPal. Payment is required upfront for the Clarity Session and 50% upfront for larger packages.
